APPLE SHORTCUTS Cover · Contents Contents Cheatsheet

A BookBank Field Guide

Apple Shortcuts

The superpower hiding in plain sight: turn the app you scroll past into one-tap tools, self-running automations, and private AI pipelines — on iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Watch. No code required.

Researched & written for the BookBank library · Covers the OS 26 releases & Apple Intelligence · 2026 edition

Contents

  1. The Superpower Hiding in Plain Sight why this app exists
  2. Anatomy of a Shortcut actions · pipeline · magic variables
  3. Your First Shortcut, Three Ways gallery · remix · from scratch
  4. Logic Without Code if · menus · repeat · dictionaries
  5. Every Way to Run a Shortcut Siri · Action Button · share sheet · Mac
  6. Automations: When Your Phone Acts First triggers · run modes · starter pack
  7. The AI Layer: Use Model & Friends OS 26 · on-device · Private Cloud Compute
  8. Use Cases: Running Your Day morning brief · NFC · health · battery
  9. Use Cases: Getting Work Done meeting funnel · batch images · expenses
  10. The Power-User Toolkit App Intents · APIs · SSH · sharing
  11. Cheatsheet the whole book on one page
How to read

Chapters 1–4 build the mental model, 5–7 make shortcuts reachable, automatic, and intelligent, 8–9 are pure use cases, and 10 is the deep end. Turn pages with → and ←; press ↑ to return here.
